greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Fancy Pets. I'm the virtual receptionist. How can we pamper your pet today?

faq.a: Yes! Please call us at (480) 699-1077 to schedule your grooming appointment.

faq.q: How long does a full groom take?
faq.a: Most sessions take 1.5-2 hours depending on your dog's size, breed, and coat condition.
We're in Phoenix, Arizona. Call us for our exact address and directions.
We primarily specialize in dog grooming. Please call to confirm if we can accommodate your cat.
Yes! With 225+ reviews at 4.6 stars, our experienced groomers work with dogs of all breeds and sizes.
